summary: Completed backend testing of 5-stage pipeline (Extract → Classify → Verify → Project → Draft) with 12 new API endpoints. All 19 tests passed (100%). Pipeline is fully functional with existing data: 2 document extracts, 1 case extract (20 facts, 5 events, 5 findings), 5 classified issues (all verified), 5 grounds synced.
critical_code_review_comments: Pipeline router at /app/backend/routers/pipeline.py implements all 12 endpoints correctly
All endpoints enforce case ownership via _require_case_ownership helper
LLM endpoints (extract, classify, verify) use call_llm_for_json with proper validation functions
Document extraction generates unique IDs with prefixes: ext_, fact_, evt_, find_
Issue classification generates unique IDs with prefix: iss_
Verification generates unique IDs with prefix: ver_
Grounds sync generates unique IDs with prefix: ground_
Legitimacy scores calculated correctly: legal_score, evidence_score, viability_score, total_score, rating
Pipeline status endpoint provides comprehensive stage counts for UI progress tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline endpoints fully tested. Current state for case_87ef925be713: 13 documents total, 2 extracted (ext_c955ed0114be, ext_ba6a34e87288), case extract ready (cex_a5b00bf8deab with 20 facts, 5 events, 5 findings), 5 issues classified (all verified), 5 grounds synced. All LLM endpoints (extract, classify, verify, verify-all) working with 10-60 second response times.

get_case_extract.details: Returns case extract with 20 facts, 5 events, 5 findings

refresh_case_extract.details: Merges document extracts into case extract
